import { client_metadata } from "std/oauth/dynamic_registration"

let metadata = client_metadata({redirect_uris: ["http://app.example/callback"]})

import { client_metadata } from "std/oauth/dynamic_registration"

let metadata = client_metadata({redirect_uris: ["https://app.example/callback", "http://127.0.0.1:3987/callback"]})
